features.description: Owner can sign up with email and password
Owner can log in with email and password
Owner can log out
Owner can create a project by pasting a URL
Owner can create a project by uploading an image
steps: Upload a PNG or JPG file

features.description: Owner can create a project by uploading a PDF
Screenshot is captured automatically after URL project is created
steps: Verify a screenshot image is displayed on the canvas
Verify projects.screenshot_url is populated in the database

features.description: Uploaded image is displayed as the canvas for image projects
steps: Verify the uploaded image is displayed on the canvas

features.description: Owner can generate a shareable review link
steps: Verify a unique review URL is displayed and can be copied

features.description: Shareable link grants public access without login
steps: Open the link in an incognito window
Verify /review/[token] loads the project canvas without prompting for login

features.description: Reviewer can see the project screenshot on the canvas
steps: Verify the screenshot or uploaded file is visible

features.description: Reviewer can click anywhere on the canvas to place a comment pin
steps: Verify a comment input appears anchored to the click position
Verify the pin position is stored as x_percent and y_percent

features.description: Reviewer can submit a comment with their name
steps: Enter display name and comment body

features.description: Comments appear in real time for all viewers
steps: Verify the comment appears in window 2 without page reload

features.description: Reviewer can reply to an existing comment
steps: Open a comment thread in the sidebar
Verify reply appears nested under the parent comment

features.description: Owner can mark a comment as resolved
steps: Verify pin changes to resolved state
Verify comments.resolved is true in the database

features.description: Owner can reopen a resolved comment
steps: Verify comments.resolved is false in the database

features.description: Owner dashboard lists all their projects
steps: Verify all created projects are listed

features.description: Dashboard shows comment count per project
steps: Verify each project card displays the number of comments

features.description: Owner can click a project card to open the project
Stripe checkout session can be created (placeholder)
steps: Trigger Stripe checkout flow (UI TBD in Phase 3)
Verify a Stripe checkout session is created without errors
Verify redirect to Stripe hosted checkout page
